title: hieracium obscuratum subsp. obscuratum
intro: Hieracium obscuratum subsp. obscuratum, also known as obscure hawkweed, is a plant species within the dandelion family. Traditionally, obscure hawkweed has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant's health benefits include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne, wounds, and eczema, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Obscure hawkweed can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
